title: Local env profile support for live staged operator runs
problem: Staged live LLM gates (extract/link/build) and model alias overrides (e.g. qwen3.5:9b via RGE_LOCAL_LLM) are documented across README/AGENTS but not consolidated in .env.example. Operators must manually set many env vars per run.
acceptance_criteria: .env.example documents RGE_LLM_MODE, RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM, RGE_LOCAL_LLM, OLLAMA_BASE_URL, RGE_ALLOW_SOURCE_NETWORK, OPENALEX_MAILTO, and staged live gates (extract/link/build) as commented placeholders.
No change to default model behavior or live fallthrough implementation.
